title: BEM-623 remediation plan
objective:

sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

plan={
 'schema_version':'architecture_remediation_plan.v1',
 'bem':'BEM-623',
 'source_report':'governance/reports/bem622_internal_contour_deep_audit_report.md',
 'status':'ready_for_execution',
 'goal':'Close architecture gaps found during BEM-622 internal contour deep audit.',
 'items':[
   {'id':'R1','gap':'Claude primary runtime not proven','fix':'Add mandatory Claude-authored smoke response artifact before selecting Claude primary. If absent, selected_provider must be gpt_reserve with blocker/reason.','evidence_required':['governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/*response*.md','governance/provider_gates/*claude_runtime_smoke*.json']},
   {'id':'R2','gap':'Live Telegram delivery not confirmed','fix':'Add post-trigger delivery verifier that checks curator_hourly_report_state.telegram_delivery=sent and creates alert/report if not sent.','evidence_required':['governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json','governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md']},
   {'id':'R3','gap':'Old failed workflow notifications confuse operator','fix':'Add current-run supersede report and suppress false PASS. Keep stale failures tagged as superseded only after latest workflow static validation.','evidence_required':['governance/state/bem620_supersede_old_failed_runs_and_live_trigger.json']},
   {'id':'R4','gap':'Executor sandbox restrictions caused repeated selftest failures','fix':'Document executor-safe subset and add preflight linter for task objectives: no exec call, no Exception as e, no forbidden module words.','evidence_required':['governance/protocols/PYTHON_EXECUTOR_SAFE_SUBSET.md','scripts/executor_objective_preflight.py']},
   {'id':'R5','gap':'File-based roles can look like live LLM roles','fix':'Report must explicitly distinguish live provider role vs file-based governance artifact role.','evidence_required':['governance/protocols/ROLE_EXECUTION_EVIDENCE_CANON.md']}
 ],
 'next_execution_order':['R4','R1','R2','R5','R3'],
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:03 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}
plan_file=state_dir/'bem623_internal_contour_architecture_remediation_plan.json'
plan_file.write_text(json.dumps(plan,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

protocol=protocols/'INTERNAL_CONTOUR_ARCHITECTURE_GAP_CLOSURE.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-623 | Internal Contour Architecture Gap Closure'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:03 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Required fixes'+sep+sep+'1. Claude primary cannot be marked PASS without Claude-authored runtime artifact.'+sep+'2. Telegram delivery cannot be marked PASS without `telegram_delivery=sent` in repo state.'+sep+'3. File-based role artifacts must be labeled separately from live provider execution.'+sep+'4. Executor tasks must pass preflight against known sandbox restrictions before dispatch.'+sep+'5. Old failed GitHub runs must be superseded only by newer validated run evidence.'+sep)

md=['# BEM-623 | Internal Contour Architecture Remediation Plan','','Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:03 (UTC+3)','','## Goal',plan['goal'],'','## Items']
for item in plan['items']:
    md.append('### '+item['id']+' | '+item['gap'])
    md.append('- Fix: '+item['fix'])
    md.append('- Evidence required: '+', '.join(item['evidence_required']))
    md.append('')
md.append('## Next execution order')
for x in plan['next_execution_order']:
    md.append('- '+x)
md.append('')
md.append('## Blocker')
md.append('null')
report=reports/'bem623_internal_contour_architecture_remediation_plan.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(md)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem623_internal_contour_architecture_remediation_plan','cycle_id':'bem623-internal-contour-architecture-remediation-plan','source':'gpt_architect','status':'ready_for_execution','plan_file':str(plan_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:03 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        state={}
state['bem623_internal_contour_architecture_remediation_plan']={'status':'ready_for_execution','plan_file':str(plan_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':None}
state['internal_contour_architecture_gap_closure']='ready_for_execution'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:03 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem623_internal_contour_architecture_remediation_plan.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-623 PASS: architecture remediation plan created and ready for execution.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(plan_file),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created architecture remediation plan for gaps found in BEM-622 internal contour audit')
